h1. Architecture and Networking

h2. Architecture Overview
The deployment uses a shared backend and multiple Terragrunt units for independent lifecycle management.

{code}
Terraform Backend (S3/DynamoDB/KMS)
  -> WorkSpaces Personal Tiers
     -> Standard
     -> SOC
     -> Dev
  -> WorkSpaces Pools
     -> Standard Pool
     -> SOC Pool
     -> Dev Pool
  -> Installs S3 Bucket
{code}

h2. Environment Parameters
|| Parameter || Value ||
| AWS Account | `111122223333` |
| Region | `us-east-1` |
| Directory Name | `workspaces-platform.local` |
| Directory ID | `d-0000000000` |
| Pool Directory ID | `d-0000000000` |
| VPC ID | `vpc-00000000000000000` |

h2. Network Ranges
|| Purpose || CIDR || Availability Zone || AZ ID ||
| WorkSpaces Subnet A | `10.164.98.128/25` | `us-east-1b` | `use1-az2` |
| WorkSpaces Subnet C | `10.164.99.0/25` | `us-east-1c` | `use1-az4` |
| Trusted CIDR | `10.164.0.0/16` | N/A | N/A |

h2. Subnet IDs in Use
|| Subnet || Subnet ID ||
| Private Subnet (A) | `subnet-00000000000000000` |
| Private Subnet (C) | `subnet-00000000000000001` |

h2. WorkSpaces Bundle Mapping
|| Tier || Bundle Name || Bundle ID ||
| Standard | `workspaces-platform-pilot-stndrd-bundle-v2` | `wsb-00000000` |
| SOC | `workspaces-platform-pilot-soc-bundle-v1` | `wsb-00000001` |
| Dev | `workspaces-platform-pilot-dev-4xlarge-v1` | `wsb-00000002` |

h2. Pool Naming
|| Pool Type || Pool Name ||
| Standard Pool | `workspaces-platform-pilot-stndrd-pool-v1` |
| SOC Pool | `workspaces-platform-pilot-soc-pool-v1` |
| Dev Pool | `workspaces-platform-pilot-dev-pool-v1` |

h2. Authentication Notes
* Personal WorkSpaces use directory-backed user provisioning.
* WorkSpaces Pools also require SAML metadata input via Secrets Manager (`saml_xml_secret_arn` in each pool Terragrunt unit).
* Do not store SAML XML directly in source-controlled files.
